repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2: finite latent-response LP projection; doc/API.md PartialID seed catalogue

published_prior_art.cite: Manski1990: nonparametric treatment-effect bounds optimize over feasible latent distributions
AtheyChettyImbensKang2019: surrogate-index point identification under Prentice surrogacy

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_partial_did_unobserved_trends: panel diagnostic information-loss kernel is DID/pretrend, not long-term surrogate transport; pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2: dynamic IV compliance LP, not noisy surrogate drift

published_prior_art.cite: FanManzanaresParkQi2026 gives terminal unknown-copula surrogate-index identified sets; HuangWangYuanZhaoZhang2026 gives longitudinal-surrogate point extrapolation, neither gives the observed-increment strict-tightening criterion
ChenGengJia2007 and MaYinLiuGeng2021 address surrogate-paradox sign criteria; they do not give noisy-panel drift transport endpoints

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed one-free-coordinate interval for x_d appears to encode support restrictions backwards: if c(1,0)>rho then gamma_10=0 should force x_d=p_d(1), while the written lower bound p_d(1)-1[c(1,0)>rho] imposes no such equality and instead overrestricts the allowed case.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the x_d interval with the exact 2x2 coupling bounds: start from max{0,p_d(1)+h_d(1)-1} <= x_d <= min{p_d(1),h_d(1)} and add equality constraints x_d=p_d(1) or x_d=h_d(1) when the corresponding off-diagonal transition is forbidden.
State the optimization over post-drift margins h_d explicitly in Conjecture 2, rather than introducing h_d only after gamma is fixed.
Add a binary numerical boundary example showing one terminal-only endpoint face removed by the observed-increment equations at rho below kappa_b.

recommended_next_step: Patch the Conjecture 2 transport formula and keep the revised strict-tightening kernel; no novelty pivot is needed.
